name: beehiiv-list-subscribers
description: Fetch a paginated, filtered list of subscribers from a Beehiiv publication. Filter by tier (free/premium), status, and premium tier IDs. Use for churn analysis, cohort targeting, and revenue reporting. Outputs a cursor for pagination loops.

API_KEY_SECRET.description: Vault path to the Beehiiv API key (e.g. 'beehiiv/api_key').

PUBLICATION_ID.description: Beehiiv publication ID (e.g. 'pub_xxx...'). Supports {{key}} template interpolation.

STATUS.description: Filter subscribers by subscription status. 'active' returns confirmed subscribers; 'inactive' returns churned/unsubscribed.

TIER.description: Filter by subscription tier. Use 'premium' to list only paying subscribers.

PREMIUM_TIER_IDS.description: Comma-separated premium tier IDs to filter by specific paid tiers (e.g. 'tier_aaa,tier_bbb'). Use beehiiv-list-premium-tiers to discover IDs.

LIMIT.description: Number of subscribers to return per page (1–100). Higher values reduce API calls for large lists.

CURSOR.description: Pagination cursor from a previous call's 'next_cursor' output. Supports {{key}} template interpolation to chain paginated loops: '{{next_cursor}}'.

DIRECTION.description: Sort direction. 'desc' returns newest subscribers first.

EXPAND_STATS.description: When true, includes per-subscriber engagement stats (open_rate, click_through_rate). Increases response size and latency.

EXPAND_CUSTOM_FIELDS.description: When true, includes custom field values for each subscriber.

setup_instructions.title: Common pattern — list premium subscribers
setup_instructions.detail: Set TIER to 'premium' and STATUS to 'active' to get all paying subscribers. Use with EXPAND_STATS=true to include engagement metrics for churn risk analysis.

setup_instructions.title: Pagination in loops
setup_instructions.detail: When has_more is true in the output, the next_cursor field contains a token for the next page. Pass it to a subsequent node using CURSOR='{{next_cursor}}' to iterate through all results.

setup_instructions.title: Revenue reporting pattern
setup_instructions.detail: Chain: [schedule trigger] → [beehiiv-list-subscribers: TIER=premium, STATUS=active] → [LLM node: summarize count and tier breakdown] → [notification].
